name: @buckmason/cli
description: Customer-facing Buck Mason CLI for agents: catalog, stock, orders, returns, checkout handoffs, and lookbooks.

oclif.description:
Customer-facing Buck Mason CLI for agents: catalog, stock, orders, returns, checkout handoffs, and lookbooks.

Agent recipes:
- Check daily for new arrivals, compare them against my wardrobe and saved sizes, and send me a lookbook only when something meaningfully improves my closet.
- Watch my calendar for trips and events, then build location-aware lookbooks with owned outfits first and local pickup or shipping options only where they help.
- Use my wardrobe, tomorrow's weather, and the event dress code to propose three looks, then identify one optional in-town purchase that would complete the best one.

Checkout still requires explicit customer approval.

auth.description: Authorize this agent with a Buck Mason customer account

products.description: Search and inspect Buck Mason products

wardrobe.description: Local wardrobe memory from customer order history

returns.description: Return reasons, return status, and return creation

lookbook.description: Build, validate, score, and rank Buck Mason lookbooks
